condition: Displayed value and stored value are identical, correctly rounded (Decimal).
task: Exchange EUR→USD and assert the credited history amount equals the displayed 'You get'.
title: Conversion rounds wrong into history

condition: P&L sign matches actual gain/loss.
task: Open Portfolio and assert TSLA's P&L renders as a loss (negative, red).
title: Loss displayed as gain

condition: The credited amount reflects the displayed fee.
expectedBuggy: Fee ignored — credited amount is higher than shown.
expectedClean: Credited amount reflects the displayed fee.
task: Exchange and assert the credited amount matches the fee-deducted 'You get'.
title: Exchange ignores the fee it displays

condition: P&L percent is measured against cost basis.
task: Assert portfolio P&L % equals P&L ÷ cost basis.
title: P&L % divides by market value, not cost

condition: Total balance sums every account.
expectedBuggy: GBP account omitted from the total.
task: Assert Home total equals the sum of all three accounts.
title: Total balance omits an account

condition: Limit sell below market warns; qty must be > 0.
expectedClean: Zero qty blocked; below-market limit sell warns.
task: Set qty to 0 and assert Review is disabled; place a below-market limit sell and assert a warning shows.
title: Bad limit orders accepted silently

condition: Continue requires an amount greater than zero.
task: Enter recipient and amount 0; assert Continue is disabled.
title: Zero-amount transfer allowed

condition: Leading/trailing whitespace is trimmed before validation.
expectedBuggy: Spaces accepted as a valid recipient.
task: Enter a spaces-only recipient; assert Continue stays disabled.
title: Recipient whitespace not trimmed

condition: The app passcode must be the full required length.
task: During passcode setup, assert a 4-digit passcode is rejected (6 required).
title: Short passcode accepted

condition: Continue is blocked when the amount exceeds the balance.
task: Enter an amount above the balance; assert Continue is disabled.
title: Transfer over balance allowed

condition: Amounts parse correctly under the active locale.
task: Type '1,000.50' into an amount field under en_US; assert it parses to 1000.50.
title: 1,000.50 parsed as 1.00050

condition: Dates render in a stable, correct timezone.
expectedBuggy: Dates shifted to a far-off timezone.
expectedClean: Dates in the app's home timezone.
task: Open Transactions and assert a known transaction's day/time matches the home timezone.
title: Transaction date shifts by timezone

condition: Balance reflects latest state after any mutation.
expectedBuggy: Home keeps showing the pre-transfer balance.
task: Note the Home balance, make a transfer, return to Home; assert the balance decreased.
title: Dashboard shows pre-transfer balance

condition: Each transaction appears once.
task: Tap Load more and assert each transaction id appears exactly once.
title: Transaction duplicated after Load more

condition: Toggle state persists and reads back correctly.
task: Turn on Freeze; assert the FROZEN badge appears.
title: Freeze toggle reads back inverted

condition: A filter shows only its own category.
task: Select the Money-in filter; assert every visible row is money-in.
title: Money-in filter leaks money-out rows

condition: A filled order reports filled, not pending.
task: Place a market order; assert the status reports filled.
title: Filled order still shows pending

condition: Confirm is idempotent; one tap = one transaction.
task: Rapidly double-tap Confirm; assert exactly one transaction / one debit.
title: Rapid double-tap sends twice

condition: Confirmation price equals the price acted on.
task: Read the asset price, tap Buy, and assert the order's reference price equals it.
title: Order price ≠ tapped price

condition: Place is idempotent; one tap = one order.
task: Double-tap Place order; assert only one order/holding change occurs.
title: Rapid double-tap places two orders

condition: Execute is idempotent; one tap = one exchange.
task: Double-tap Exchange; assert only one exchange executes.
title: Rapid double-tap exchanges twice

condition: Long lists render lazily and stay smooth.
expectedBuggy: Whole huge list rendered at once → hitches.
task: Open Transactions and assert scrolling stays responsive / paginated.
title: History renders a huge non-lazy list

condition: Work stays off the main thread; the UI never hangs.
task: Open Portfolio and assert the tab becomes responsive within a small budget.
title: Portfolio blocks the main thread on open

condition: The live feed polls at a sane interval.
task: In live mode, assert the quote endpoint isn't polled excessively.
title: Live feed polls 10× too often

condition: Expensive work is not redone on every render.
expectedBuggy: Whole list re-sorted on every render.
task: Profile Transactions rendering; assert the list isn't re-sorted each render.
title: History re-sorts on every render

condition: A disabled-looking control is actually non-interactive.
expectedBuggy: Button looks disabled but is hittable.
task: With an invalid form, assert Continue reports isEnabled == false.
title: Button looks disabled but still fires

condition: A successful action shows a confirmation toast.
task: Complete a transfer; assert the success toast appears.
title: No success toast after a transfer

condition: Every element has a unique, stable accessibility identifier.
expectedClean: Every row has a unique identifier.
task: In Markets, assert each asset identifier matches exactly one element.
title: Two market rows share one identifier

condition: Every control exposes a meaningful accessibility label.
task: Assert the Place-order button exposes a non-empty accessibility label.
title: Place-order button has no accessibility label

condition: A control's accessibility label matches its action.
task: Assert the Buy button's accessibility label reads 'Buy'.
title: Buy button is labelled 'Sell'

condition: Resend is blocked until the cooldown elapses.
task: On the OTP screen, assert Resend is disabled until the cooldown elapses.
title: OTP resend ignores the cooldown

condition: Sensitive screens always require the gate.
task: Unlock, background then foreground the app; assert re-auth is required.
title: Gate skipped after backgrounding

condition: Sensitive screens are obscured when the app is inactive.
expectedClean: Sensitive content is covered when inactive.
task: Send the app to the inactive/switcher state; assert the privacy cover appears.
title: Sensitive data visible in app switcher

condition: An expired one-time code is rejected.
task: Let the OTP expire (>20s), enter the code; assert it is rejected.
title: Expired OTP still accepted

condition: Too many wrong codes locks the OTP step.
task: Enter a wrong code 3×; assert the OTP step locks.
title: No lockout after repeated wrong OTP

condition: An idle session re-locks after the timeout.
task: Leave the app idle past the timeout; assert it re-locks.
title: Session never times out

condition: Secrets live in the Keychain, never in UserDefaults.
task: After login, inspect storage; assert the session token is NOT in UserDefaults.
title: Session token stored in UserDefaults

condition: The card PAN is masked except the last 4 digits.
task: Assert the card number is masked except the last four digits.
title: Full card number shown unmasked

condition: The CVV is never displayed on screen.
task: Assert no CVV is shown on the card face.
title: CVV shown on the card face

condition: Secrets are never logged.
expectedBuggy: OTP code written to the console.
task: Inspect the console during OTP; assert the code is never logged.
title: OTP code written to the console log

condition: Retries are idempotent; a retried request never double-posts.
task: Trigger a timeout, tap Retry; assert only one transaction/debit results.
title: Retry after slow response duplicates the payment

condition: An out-of-order/late response never clobbers newer data.
expectedBuggy: Stale response clobbers the fresh balance.
task: Switch the sell currency quickly; assert the balance shows the newest currency.
title: Stale response overwrites fresh state

condition: A failed/timed-out request is surfaced as an error, not success.
task: Make a transfer that times out; assert an error (not success) is shown.
title: Timeout shown as a successful transfer

condition: A stale cache is refreshed or clearly marked as stale.
expectedBuggy: Reads keep serving a stale snapshot.
task: Mutate a balance and refresh; assert reads reflect the change.
title: Offline cache shows an outdated balance
